div.p: Rule 1: Segment must be rotated and immutable (CLOSED). Rule 2: min_rec_lsn (Checkpoint) must exceed Segment's max_lsn.

ul.li: DPT Entry: rec_lsn is the LSN of the first log record that made a page dirty.
Checkpoint: Global min_rec_lsn is the point where recovery starts.
Truncation Safety: Only segments where Max_LSN < min_rec_lsn are safe to delete because no dirty pages in memory require their redo records.

g.title: Ensures no redo logs needed for recovery
Ensures no redo logs needed for recovery
